_meta.description: Original progress indicator designs created for this repository. Includes spinners covering every spinner group and progress bar styles covering every progress bar group used in progress-indicators.json.

brailleRadarSweep.notes: Two-cell sweep that gives a clockwise scan effect.

lineTripod.notes: Compact single-cell spinner using heavy line caps.

dotSeesaw.notes: One active dot rocking left and right across a 4-cell lane.

blockEscalator.notes: Dual-cell staircase pulse with mirrored descent.

geometricPinwheel.notes: Quarter triangles arranged as a rotating pinwheel.

arrowCrosswind.notes: Directional pair rotates through cardinal and diagonal vectors.

bouncePulse.notes: Single glyph pulse from light to solid and back.

scrollTicker.notes: Scrolling wave that reads like a moving signal trace.

noveltyCircuitProbe.notes: Theme spinner resembling an LED test strip sweep.

textChecksum.notes: Hex-like text spinner suitable for data verification tasks.

symbolTrigrams.notes: Eight trigrams sequence used as a symbolic cycle.

asciiRelay.notes: High-contrast ASCII style for terminals without Unicode support.

blockForge.notes: Dense block fill with explicit head character.

geometricCrystals.notes: Diamond-based bar with a distinct leading edge.

decorativeSpark.notes: Ornamental style intended for playful CLI output.

phasedMoon.notes: Five-phase smooth fill using moon-like circular glyphs.

emojiTraffic.notes: Simple traffic-light semantics for status-rich progress displays.
